message:
feat(harness): add explainability workbench module and enrich fault-injection artifact join keys

Explainability workbench (bd-26xb.4):
- New module: explainability_workbench.rs (1207 lines) providing a
  deterministic trace-to-decision drilldown over structured log bundles.
  Parses JSONL logs and optional artifact-index JSON, builds a
  WorkbenchReport containing per-trace timeline reconstruction,
  validator stage firing analysis, strict-vs-hardened mode divergence,
  and artifact cross-references for root-cause drilldown.
- Supports three output formats: JSON (serde), plain text table, and
  ftui (when frankentui-ui feature is enabled)
- Filterable by trace_id and scenario_id
- lib.rs: register explainability_workbench as a public module

Harness CLI (bin/harness.rs):
- Add ExplainabilityWorkbench subcommand with --log, --artifact-index,
  --trace-id, --scenario-id, --format (json|plain|ftui), --output,
  --ansi, and --width flags
- Wire through to explainability_workbench::build_report() and the
  three rendering backends

Fault injection (fault_injection.rs):
- Enrich artifact index entries with ArtifactJoinKeys containing
  trace_ids extracted from the fault run report cases
- Use add_with_join_keys() instead of add() for log and report artifacts
- Add manifest artifact entry to the artifact index when the manifest
  file exists on disk
- Add artifact_join_keys() helper to extract trace IDs from report

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
